name: navigation-menu
description: A site navigation landmark (<nav>, not role=menu) with real <a href> links and rich disclosure panels (APG Disclosure Navigation pattern). UNCONTROLLED HEADLESS: panels open/close via native [popover=auto] (Esc + light-dismiss built-in), enhanced by popover-anchor.enhancer.ts (focus return) and collection-nav.enhancer.ts (arrow keys + typeahead). Zero server round-trip to open/close. Server-first PARTIAL+ENH (v-next re-forge). Compose top-level items with navigation-menu/link (leaf links) and navigation-menu/menu (disclosure trigger+panel). Panels contain navigation-menu/link(inPanel=true) items grouped via navigation-menu/menu/group.
